title: Just Glowing Buttons
description: These 16 Colored Buttons Glows/Emits Light. Best To Use With Shaders.
body:
### **Just Glowing Buttons** adds 16 colored buttons that glows or emits light. These buttons will look better if you use shaders.
### These Buttons can be use in decorations as well.

---

_Currently Available For: Forge-1.20.1 & NeoForge-1.20.4_
_Other versions' support are on the way!_
